PITSTOP - how to run it
========================

You only need the two files in this folder:
  - TripPlanner.exe                      (the app)
  - Go Online (makeitoutthegc.ca).bat    (puts it online at your domain)

STEP 1 - run it locally
  Double-click TripPlanner.exe
  If Windows shows a blue "Windows protected your PC" box, click
  "More info" then "Run anyway". (It is unsigned, not a virus.)
  A window opens; your browser goes to http://localhost:4040
  First visit: create your account - you become the admin.

STEP 2 - go live at https://makeitoutthegc.ca
  Keep TripPlanner.exe running.
  Double-click "Go Online (makeitoutthegc.ca).bat"
  The first time, a browser opens to log in to Cloudflare - pick the
  makeitoutthegc.ca zone and authorize. The script does the rest and
  starts serving your app at https://makeitoutthegc.ca

  Keep that black window open = site is live.
  Close it = site goes offline (the app keeps running locally).

Every time after that: run the exe, then run the Go Online bat. No
browser login needed again.
